name: O-13 detector flags a source line containing the dot-form deprecated token id (e.g., color.legacy.red)
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'export const danger = tokens.color.legacy.red;\n' > src/colors.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/design-token-freshness.sh" --registry "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/design-tokens/registry.yaml" --paths src 2>err.txt && grep -q 'token=color.legacy.red' err.txt && echo flagged 1>&2
